use_cases: Showcase product features with engaging scroll-triggered parallax animations
Display service offerings with alternating image-text layouts
Create interactive landing page sections with depth effects
Present portfolio or case study content with smooth transitions
Build feature comparison sections with scroll-driven reveals
ai_summary: A parallax scroll feature section component that displays multiple feature blocks with alternating layouts and scroll-triggered animations. Uses framer-motion's useScroll and useTransform hooks to create parallax effects as users scroll through content sections. Features clean image display with accompanying titles and descriptions, suitable for showcasing product features or service offerings in a modern, engaging way.
